chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1569 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 21.8.2025 Mr. Abdul Rauf Malik advocate for the petitioners -------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
